# ThesisDocument

Source: `schemas/thesis-document.schema.json`

Schema ID: `https://thesisdocx.local/schemas/thesis-document.schema.json`

Structured thesis content consumed by the deterministic DOCX renderer.

## Root

Type: `object`

Required fields: `metadata`, `schemaVersion`, `sections`

### Root Properties

| Field | Type | Required | Enum / Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `metadata` | Metadata | yes |  |  |
| `schemaVersion` | enum(1.0.0, 1.1.0) | yes | enum: 1.0.0, 1.1.0 | Structured input contract version. |
| `sections` | Section[] | yes |  | Ordered thesis sections. |
